scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run package:api && pnpm run image:web && pnpm run image:api
scripts.clean: pnpm -r --if-present run clean && rimraf python/ade-engine/dist python/ade-config-template/dist
scripts.package:api: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('apps/api/.package', { recursive: true, force: true })" && pnpm --filter @ade/api deploy --prod --legacy apps/api/.package
scripts.check:ts: pnpm run build:api && pnpm --filter @ade/api test && pnpm run build:web
scripts.check:python: uv build --directory python/ade-engine && uv build --directory python/ade-config-template
scripts.check: pnpm run check:ts && pnpm run check:python
